label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out this ethical dilemma about my friend and the drugs. Let me start by breaking down the problem. My friend told me they're experimenting with drugs, and their parents don't know. I have to decide whether to tell the parents or keep it a secret. First, let me think about the different sides. On one hand, my friend entrusted me with this information. That trust is important in any friendship, and if I tell their parents, they might feel betrayed. That could hurt the relationship and maybe make my friend less likely to talk to me in the future. But on the other hand, if I keep it a secret, and something bad happens to my friend because of the drug use,
